calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Northside Independent School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Northside Independent School District is Monday, August 11, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Northside Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Northside Independent School District runs Mar 9, 2026–Mar 13, 2026, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Battle of Flowers
yearNumbers.detail: Northside ISD observes the Battle of Flowers as a school holiday — a San Antonio Fiesta tradition unique to Bexar County districts and not found in any major DFW or Austin district.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday + Easter
yearNumbers.detail: Both Good Friday and Easter Monday are school holidays, giving families a four-day Easter break.

calendarNotes: Northside ISD begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 11, 2025. Spring Break runs March 9–13, 2026 — about one week earlier than Dallas ISD and Austin ISD. The school year ends May 21, 2026. Northside ISD observes the Battle of Flowers (April 23) as a no-school day, tied to San Antonio's Fiesta celebration.
